# Project Aurora

Project Aurora 于 2025-03-01 启动，项目负责人是 Lin。
This is a test fixture for local-llm-wiki MVP 1 verification.

## Overview

Aurora is a new platform initiative focused on real-time data processing.
The project lead is Lin, who has been with the company for 5 years.

## Timeline

- Start date: 2025-03-01
- Team: Lin (lead), 3 engineers
- Budget: To be determined
